case_title: THE ROOSEVELT BANK vs. CHU, SUN MAN et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE ROOSEVELT BANK SERVED OCT-16-1995, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHU, SUN MAN CHU, YUK LAN

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE ROOSEVELT BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHU, SUN MAN CHU, YUK LAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2774 40TH AVE
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CHU, SUN MAN CHU, YUK LAN
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE DAILY RENTAL VALUE TO BE $50.00 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE ROOSEVELT BANK
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT CHU, SUN MAN CHU, YUK LAN
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR STAY OF EXECUTION RENT DEPOSIT WITH THE PLTF'S COUNSEL FILED BY DEFENDANT CHU, SUN MAN STAYED UNTIL NOV-21-1995, $80.00 DEPOSITED AS RENT
DOE MOK HO CHOI FILED A CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION ON 28/NOV/95, THE FILING WAS REJECTED BY THE SHERIFF DEP. $80 FILING FEE RETURNED TO DEPOSITOR, HRG VACATED, ALL PARTIES NOTIFIED.
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE ROOSEVELT BANK AS TO DEFENDANT CHU, SUN MAN CHU, YUK LAN
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE ROOSEVELT BANK AS TO DEFENDANT CHU, SUN MAN CHU, YUK LAN DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED
